final_plan:
#Task1: Retrieve the power usage data for CQPA AHU 1 at the MAIN site on 6/14/20.
#Agent1: IoT Data Download
#Dependency1: None
#ExpectedOutput1: Power usage data for CQPA AHU 1 at MAIN site on 6/14/20.

#Task2: Analyze the retrieved data to determine the power usage.
#Agent2: Time Series Analytics and Forecasting
#Dependency2: #S1
#ExpectedOutput2: Analysis of power usage for CQPA AHU 1 on 6/14/20.

#Task3: Provide the final answer on the power usage of CQPA AHU 1 on 6/14/20.
#Agent3: IoT Data Download
#Dependency3: #S1 #S2
#ExpectedOutput3: Final power usage value for CQPA AHU 1 on 6/14/20.

#Task4: Generate a work order for inspecting CQPA AHU 1 if necessary based on the power usage analysis.
#Agent4: WorkOrder Agent
#Dependency4: #S2 #S3
#ExpectedOutput4: Work order for inspecting CQPA AHU 1 if the power usage is anomalous.
